sutta: [Music] months these 6 are above all what 6 the sight above all the sound above all the gain above all the training above all the service above all the ever minding above all and what mounts is the sight above all here in monks some go and to see the treasures the elephant the horse the gem to see diverse things to see some recluse or brahmin wrong in view trading the wrong path and is that the sight monks no i say it is not it is indeed a mean sight common vulgar un-aryan not well-founded leading not to world-weariness dispassion ending calm knowledge awakening nibbana but some endowed with faith and piety sure in trust go to see the tata gata or the tata gata's disciple that monks is the site above all sites for purging man overcoming grief and war clearing away ill and pain winning truth and realizing nibana i mean going to see the tata gata or his disciple endowed with faith and piety sure in trust this month is called the sight above all hearing is the sight above all and what monks is the sound above all here in monks some go to hear the sound of the drum the loot the sound of song to hear diverse things to hear the dhamma of some recluse or brahmin wrong in view pleading the wrong path and is that the sound monks no i say it is not it is indeed a mean sound common vulgar un-aryan etc but some endowed with faith and piety sure in trust go to hear the tatar gathers dhamma or his disciples that monks is the sound above all sounds for purging man i mean going to hear the tata gathers dhamma or his disciples dharma or his disciples this month is called the sound above all hearing is the sight and sound above all and what monks is again above all here in monks some gain the gain of a son or a wife or wealth gain diverse things gain faith in some recluse or brahmin wrong in view treading the wrong path and is that again monks no i say it is not it is indeed a mean gain but some endowed with faith and piety sure in trust gain faith in the or his disciple that monks is the being above all gains for purging man i mean gaining faith in the tata gata or his disciple this monk is called the gain above all hearing is the sight sound and gain above all and what monks is the straining above all here in monks some train in elephant law in horse manship in the use of the chariot the bow the sword train in diverse ways train after the way of some recruits or brahmin wrong in view trading the wrong path and is that the training monks no i say it is not it is indeed a mean training but some endowed with faith and piety sure in trust trained in the onward course of higher virtue higher mind and higher wisdom according to the dhamma vinaya declared by the tata gata that monks is the training above all training for purging men i mean training in the onward cause of higher virtue higher mind and higher wisdom this month is called the training above all hearing is the sight sound gain and training above all and what monks is a service above all here in monks some serve a warrior a brahmin a householder serve diverse folks serve some recruits or brahmin wrong in view trading the wrong path and is that the service monks no i say it is not it is indeed a mean service but some endowed with faith and piety sure in trust serve the tatar gatherer or his disciple that monks is the service above all services for purging men i mean serving the tata gata or his disciple this monks is called the service above all hearing is the sight sound gain training and service above all and what monks is the ever minding above all here in monks some ever mind the gain of a son or a wife or wealth ever mind diverse gains ever mind some recluse or brahmin wrong in view treading the wrong path and is that the ever-minding monks no i say it is not it is indeed a mean ever-minding common vulgar un-aryan not well-founded leading not to world wariness dispassion ending calm knowledge awakening nibana but some endowed with faith and piety sure in trust ever mind the tata gata or the tatar gathers disciple that monks is the ever minding above all ever minding for purging man overcoming grief and war clearing away ill and pain winning truth and realizing nibana i mean ever minding that tagatha or his disciple endowed with faith and piety sure in trust this month is called the ever-minding above all verily amongst these are the sikhs above all that's the end of the sutta
commentary:
here the buddha is saying that the the site above all sides is going to see that or his disciple and then the sound above all sounds is to hear that the tagatha's dharma all his disciples and the gain above all gains is to gain faith in the tatar gatherer of his disciple and the training above all is the training in the higher virtue the higher mind and the higher wisdom is the adi sila adichitta and adipanya and then the the service above all services is to serve the tata gata or his disciple and the ever-minding above allah that is remembering is to have a minor that the tagatha or the tattagatas disciple you see the buddha is saying the right path leads to world weariness dispassion ending calm knowledge awakening nibana if we practice anything that leads to greater passion for the world and greater excitement for the world that is not the spiritual path not the holy path it is a path that leads to enjoyment of the world which ends in more dukkha but the path that leads to weariness of the world is a part that leads to a dispassion for the world and that is a path that leads up ultimately to the greatest happiness


===== SOURCE: 057_Anguttara Nikaya Book  6C 6434 - 6544 by Bhante Hye Dhammavuddho Mahathera.txt =====
